    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class application.Main
    launch the application
    Main - Class in application
    The main entry point for the application.
    Main() - Constructor for class application.Main
    Default constructor for Main.
    MainMenu - Class in gui
    Represents the main menu UI.
    MainMenu() - Constructor for class gui.MainMenu
    Constructs the main menu.
    makeAnIngredientOrder(ItemSpriteType) - Method in class logic.GameInstance
    Increase the amount of ingredient to order from the computer shop.
    MASHED_POTATO - Enum constant in enum class logic.ItemSpriteType
    Enum constant for item sprite type.
    MashedPotato - Class in entity.ingredients
    Represents a mashed potato ingredient.
    MashedPotato() - Constructor for class entity.ingredients.MashedPotato
    Constructs a new Mashed Potato ingredient.
    MAX_GAME_TIME - Static variable in class logic.GameInstance
    Maximum internal game time counted by game instance.
    MAXIMUM_DAY - Static variable in class logic.GameInstance
    Maximum value of day count of the game.
    Game will end once day count reach this value.
    medias - Variable in class util.wrapper.BackgroundMusicTrack
    The list of media use as a source for media player
    menu - Variable in class gui.components.FoodOrder
    The specific menu item for this order.
    menu - Variable in enum class logic.MenuType
    The menu object associated with this menu type.
    menuType - Variable in class gui.components.FoodOrder
    The general type of the menu.
    MenuType - Enum Class in logic
    Represents the types of menus available.
    MenuType(int) - Constructor for enum class logic.MenuType
    Constructs a MenuType with a base sale price.
    Milk - Class in entity.ingredients
    Represents milk ingredient.
    Milk() - Constructor for class entity.ingredients.Milk
    Constructs a new Milk ingredient.
    MILK - Enum constant in enum class logic.ItemSpriteType
    Enum constant for item sprite type.
    milkSupply - Static variable in class logic.counters.IceCreamMachine
    The internal milk supply tracker for the machine.
    milkSupplyLabel - Variable in class gui.room.ColdZoneRoom
    The label displaying the current milk supply.
    mix() - Method in class entity.ingredients.Potato
    Set mixing state to true if conditions are met.
    mix() - Method in class entity.ingredients.Tomato
    Set mixing state to true if conditions are met.
    mix() - Method in class entity.ingredients.WheatFlour
    Set mixing state to true if conditions are met.
    mix() - Method in interface entity.Mixable
    Set mixing state to true if conditions are met.
    Mixable - Interface in entity
    Interface for ingredient that can be interacted with using Mixer
    Mixer - Class in logic.counters
    Counter for mixing ingredients.
    Mixer(double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class logic.counters.Mixer
    Constructs a Mixer.
    mixing - Variable in class entity.ingredients.Potato
    Whether the potato is currently being mixed.
    mixing - Variable in class entity.ingredients.Tomato
    Whether the tomato is currently being mixed.
    mixing - Variable in class entity.ingredients.WheatFlour
    Whether the flour is currently being mixed.
    mixing - Variable in class logic.counters.Mixer
    A flag indicating if the mixer is currently mixing.
    mode - Variable in class util.wrapper.BackgroundMusicTrack
    The playback mode of the music track.
    mouseAnchorX - Variable in class gui.components.FoodOrder
    The X coordinate anchor point for dragging the order paper.
    mouseAnchorX - Variable in class sprites.ItemSprite
    The X coordinate anchor point for dragging the sprite.
    mouseAnchorY - Variable in class gui.components.FoodOrder
    The Y coordinate anchor point for dragging the order paper.
    mouseAnchorY - Variable in class sprites.ItemSprite
    The Y coordinate anchor point for dragging the sprite.
    mousePressed - Variable in class sprites.ItemSprite
    A flag indicating if the mouse is currently pressed on the sprite.
    movable - Variable in class sprites.ItemSprite
    A flag indicating if the sprite can be dragged by the user.
